title: TSD Agent Lab Task Specification
description: Defines a task for an agent to execute within the TSD Agent Lab harness.

task_id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for this task.

mode.description: Agent permission level. read-only: no file changes. patch-only: local changes only, no commits. commit-allowed: local commits allowed, no pushes. review-only: read-only with structured review output.

repo_url.description: Git remote URL for the target repository. Must be an allowlisted repository.

base_ref.description: Git ref to base the worktree on (branch, tag, or commit SHA).

working_directory.description: Subdirectory within the repo to use as the working directory.

agent.description: Which agent to use for execution.

prompt_file.description: Path to a file containing the agent prompt, relative to the task file.

allowed_commands.description: Shell commands the agent is permitted to run.

denied_commands.description: Shell commands the agent must never run. Checked before allowed_commands.

verification_commands.description: Commands to run after the agent completes to verify correctness.

max_runtime_minutes.description: Maximum wall-clock time for the agent run.

expected_outputs.description: Files or patterns expected to exist after the run completes.
